channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender '62 American Vintage Reissue Jazz 2012 - 3 color sunburst — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Good · Joe Mama

I have for sale a heavily modded '62 AVRI jazz that has been my main player for several years. This thing rocks! I got it without the original tuners, with the holes lightly sanded and non-original pickups. I thought, well, seal is broken, might as well go crazy! So you have here an original bass, neck , frets, neck plate. Thats about it. Everything else was modded to crank this guy to 11!

Mods:

- Klein Epic pickups

- Hipshot high mass bridge

- Hipshot ultralight vintage reverse tuners

- Sadowsky 2 band preamp, with a new route to the side for the jack, and a route to the back for the battery. Active/passive puch/pull with vintage tone control circuit, treble and bass.


*Note: Pics were from before I added the preamp. I will take more when I get a chance.

- Dunlop Straplocks

- Non-original case, but does have the original pickup/bridge covers


Multiple dings and dents in the finish, but it plays like a dream. Does absolutely everythign you could ask from a jazz bass. Vintage grind? Yep. Slap? Yep. Modern jazz bass on steroids? Yep.

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass 2009 - 2017 MIM — $800
item.description:
$800 · Good · K’s Gear

Fender Precision Bass MIM sunburst, rosewood neck, tortoise guard, sounds and plays great. No issue. some swirls/light scratches (see pics) in finis back and front. was a backup that rarely was used. Comes with hard case (see pics) little bit of wear but 100 percent functional.

Local pickup in LA would be great.

item.title: Danelectro Longhorn Bass MIK Late 90s - Yellow with brown sides — $895
item.description:
$895 · Excellent · Jon's Neato Stuff

Late 90s MIK Danelectro Longhorn bass in excellent condition. All original except for a large strap button screwed into the neck plate (completely reversible). These late 90s Danelectro MIK reissues are considered by many to be the best of the reissues.


Yellow with brown tape on the sides. It has spent most of its life with flat wound strings, so there is little if any fret wear.


Plays and is set up great. Light and easy to play. Pickups are strong, pots are not scratchy. No rust anywhere. Currently has La Bella Beatle bass flat wound strings with low mileage.


Comes with a worn but usable and well padded gig bag. It’s a guitar bag but the bass fits tightly but perfectly in it.


Shipping to CONUS only. Message me if you have any questions. Thanks for looking at my post!

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller Sire P6 lefty left handed bass- Surf Green Metallic — $425
item.description:
$425 · Excellent · Lefty Bassist Gear Outlet

This bass is in excellent condition with no signs of wear at all. Even has the plastic on the rear control cavity cover. Really beautiful bass with a great neck.

Sire Marcus Miller P6 4-string Features:

  • P/J-style bass with a lightweight build and a commitment to professional tone and playability 
  • Mahogany body with solid ash top provides the perfect canvas for a range of tonal variety 
  • Hard maple neck with C-shape profile provides a comfortable playing experience for a variety of genres and styles
  • Rosewood fingerboard with rolled edges designed for comfort, speed, and smooth navigation
  • Marcus Miller Super-PJ Revolution pickup set provides access to a range of tones, from the assertive clarity of the P-style bass to the warm expressiveness of J-style bass models
  • Marcus Heritage-3 active/passive preamp unlocks a versatile 3-band EQ for superior tone-shaping potential
  • Real bone nut and Marcus Miller Vintage-S bridge further enhance the professional sound and design

item.title: Yamaha TRB-4II Late 90s - Translucent Blue — $800
item.description:
$800 · Very Good · Down Low Gear

extremelt well taken care of Made In Japan Yamaha TRB-4II, bought from its original owner. Smoke free home, minimal wear(some minor blemishes that buff right out, no large scratches or bumps)

Neck is perfectly intonated with a medium action currently

Best I can tell is this bass was made in Japan in 1999.


Features:

35” scale

24 fret

18mm string spacing

3-Band active EQ

Active Yamaha Pickups

Bottom anchor brads bridge(crazy sustain)

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34 with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - 2021 - Natural Ash — $425
item.description:
$425 · Good · Mr. Mintony's Gear

Sterling by Music Man StingRay Ray34 4-String Bass — Yellow / Butterscotch, Maple Neck Listing Title Sterling by Music Man StingRay Ray34 4-String Bass — Yellow, Maple Neck Key Details • Make: Sterling by Music Man • Model: StingRay Ray34 • Finish: Yellow / Butterscotch • Made in: Indonesia • Serial #: SR56298 • Condition: Good • Suggested price: ~$425 OBO (used Ray34s typically run $375–$500; new is ~$880) Description Sterling by Music Man StingRay Ray34 4-string bass in a bright yellow/butterscotch finish. This is the classic StingRay platform at a working-player price: a punchy ceramic humbucker at the bridge, active 3-band EQ, and that unmistakable tuner layout on the headstock. It delivers the fat, articulate StingRay growl that works for rock, funk, R&B;, and studio work alike. Features a solid body with a bolt-on maple neck and maple fingerboard, black pickguard, and chrome hardware. The active preamp (volume plus 3-band bass/mid/treble) gives you a wide range of usable tones, and the string-through bridge keeps things tight and stable. Condition — Good: This bass shows honest wear consistent with age and use, but plays and sounds great. There are a few children's reward stickers on the front of the body (pictured); they peel off cleanly and don't affect the finish underneath. Otherwise the instrument is fully functional with no cracks or repairs. Please review all photos, which are part of the description. Specs • Body: solid, yellow/butterscotch gloss finish • Neck: bolt-on maple, maple fingerboard with black dot inlays • Pickup: single ceramic humbucker (bridge) • Electronics: active 3-band EQ (volume, bass, mid, treble) • Bridge: chrome, string-through • Tuners: chrome • Origin: Made in Indonesia • Serial: SR56298 Reasonable offers welcome — message me with any questions

item.title: Fender Mark Hoppus P bass 2012 - Surf Green — $1,964.17
item.description:
$1,964.17 · Very Good · John's Gear Locker

Very little dent in the lower body. Can barely see it. Small little dent in the head.

Works like a beast

I can budge a little on the price

item.title: Fender Mod Shop Precision Bass w/PJ Pickups — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Excellent · Ghost Mill Shop

Fender Mod Shop Precision Bass, 2021. Silverburst with roasted maple 1963 “C” neck, V-Mod P/J pickups. U.S. made, all original from Mod Shop except for the pick guard- I ordered it with tortoise shell and it looked bad so I swapped with a genuine Fender 3-ply black. Minor play wear, home studio use only, never gigged. Beautiful looking and sounding bass.

item.title: Warwick RockBass Streamer NT Neck Thru Fretless 2010s - Natural — $891
item.description:
$891 · Excellent · Philip's Gear Outlet

This has hung on wall mostly since got it in February. I love it, but I'm in a love affair with another bass. Tell her I apologize.
The bass is beautiful. It sounds thunderous and sweet at any moment. I don't want to bs you with the boring "blah, blah this thing is..." I hope someone who loves it will get it.

item.title: Ibanez 5 String Bass - Sunburst — $200
item.description:
$200 · Good · Mr. Mintony's Gear

I purchased this Ibanez 5 String Bass used to cover the instances where songs use a five string. I've had it restrung, setup, and cleaned. Barely played myself, strings brand new. Now just occupying space in the house, space that could be filled with a new guitar.


Ibanez GIO GSR205SM 5-String Bass Flamed Maple Top — Brown / Tobacco Sunburst Listing Title Ibanez GIO GSR205SM 5-String Bass — Flamed Maple Top, Brown Sunburst Key Details • Make: Ibanez • Model: GIO GSR205SM (SR Gio series) • Strings: 5 • Finish: Brown/Tobacco Sunburst (flamed maple top) • Made in: Indonesia • Serial #: I130602084 • Condition: Very Good • Suggested price: ~$200 OBO (used GSR205SM models typically run $150–$250; new is ~$330) Description Ibanez GIO GSR205SM 5-string bass with a striking flamed maple top in a brown/tobacco sunburst finish. A great-playing, versatile 5-string that punches well above its price — the slim, fast GIO neck makes it easy to get around, and the active EQ gives you everything from deep lows to bright, cutting highs. Ideal as a first 5-string, a backup, or a reliable gigging/practice bass. Features a comfortable double-cutaway body, bolt-on maple neck with a rosewood fingerboard and pearl dot inlays, and two Dynamix humbucking (soap-bar) pickups. The active preamp (with Phat II bass boost) runs on a 9V battery and provides a wide range of usable tones. Chrome hardware throughout, including the B10 bridge. Condition — Very Good: Plays and sounds great with only minor signs of normal handling. The glossy flamed-maple top is clean and eye-catching. Electronics function correctly; a fresh 9V battery is easy to swap via the rear compartment. Please review all photos, which are part of the description. Specs • Body: double-cutaway with flamed maple top, brown/tobacco sunburst gloss • Neck: bolt-on maple, GIO profile • Fingerboard: rosewood with pearl dot inlays, 24 frets • Pickups: two Dynamix humbucking (P/J-style soap-bars) • Electronics: active EQ with Phat II bass boost (9V) • Bridge: chrome • Tuners: chrome, die-cast • Origin: Made in Indonesia • Serial: I130602084

item.title: Kapa Continental Bass Guitar - Slim Hofner Neck - Short Scale - Two Pickups - Padded Gig Bag - 1967 — $569
item.description:
$569 · Good · Tom C.'s East Coast Spot

I am selling my 30 inch scale Kapa Continental Bass guitar, made in or near Silver Springs, Maryland around 1967. Has a slim Hofner made neck that plays well. Comes with a used moderately padded bass gig bag.

I’ve played this bass a lot and know it well so here is what I can tell you:

  • When I first got this bass the neck had a slight back bow, which caused lots of buzzing in the first four frets of the E and A strings. I replaced the light strings with a set of Ernie Ball 55 -110s, loosened the truss rod and now it plays nicely, with only a slight bit of buzz on the low E if you don’t fret it well.
  • The pickguard has been cracked in a number of places around the output jack. It has been securely glued and reinforced and I have added an extra screw. It isn’t pretty but is solid. 
  • The original bridge pickup has been replaced with a NOS vintage staple pickup and ring. I took off the tabs in the bottom of the ring and glued the ring to the pickguard to allow for maximum height adjustment of the pickup. Height is adjusted with four little screws on the side of the ring.
  • The Van Ghent tuners are original. The G tuners, when tuning, slips around G# (an octave lower than tune). I have used a thin screwdriver in the tuner slot and turned it a bit while tuning and it worked fine. Stays in tune, just needed to be nudged. It is possible this tuner may need a replacement at some point. The back tuner cover is included, the screw that holds it in place is missing.
  • Am pretty sure the finish has been replaced with a basic poly coating. Though it is possible it came out of the Kapa factory this way.
  • The knobs are screw-on and not original - the pot stems are pretty wide so most knobs will not fit.
  • All of the switches and knobs work. The two switches are a bit finicky, but in a logical way. Up is on, when you pull them all the way up they may not engage, so pull them slightly down and they settle in. Not annoying enough for me to change them out but should be noted.

The original tail, bridge and cover are a really nice and sturdy design, probably from Hofner (where Kapa sourced other parts like the neck and pickups). The tail cover is often missing on these bass guitars so is a real bonus!

The frets, like lots of Hofner guitars, are thin style and have some wear but still play nicely. The neck, like many Hofner necks from the 60’s, is a thin style.

Some tech notes:

Scale: 30 inches

Length: About 44 inches

Nut width: 1 5/8th

Lower Bout: 13 inches

Neck pickup reading: 8.3

Bridge pickup reading: 10.2

Both pickup readings: 4.6

Truss Rod: Yes, works

Comes with a used moderately padded bass gig bag.

I’ve described this 59 year old bass guitar as best as I can with words and images, if you have any questions be sure to ask me before you buy.

Will pack professionally and ship quickly.

item.title: EKO GUITARS JB-400 Vintage White — $288.08
item.description:
$288.08 · Brand New · BlueNoteStore Strumenti Musicali

Il JB-400 Vintage White è il basso elettrico 4 corde della serie "Tribute 400" di casa Eko Guitars. Presenta corpo in Pawlonia, manico in Acero americano e tastiera 21 tasti in Laurel. Monta due pickup JB con controlli separati di Volume e 1 tono. Ideale per il bassista che desidera uno strumento affidabile, versatile, performante e ad un costo contenuto.

Panoramica del JB-400 Vintage White di Eko Guitars

Dopo la ricerca e le sperimentazioni del nostro laboratorio di liuteria abbiamo trovato interessante proporre strumenti dallo stile vintage, che non perde mai il suo fascino. Grazie a particolari colorazioni e finiture potrai vivere l'esperienza di suonare uno strumento dall'intramontabile stile vintage ad un prezzo contenuto. Basso a 4 corde con manico in acero americano, giunzione manico corpo bolt on e corpo in Pawlonia. Il Truss rod è a doppia azione, all'interno della tastiera in Laurel. Il ponte è in stile vintage a 4 sellette; i pickups sono due JB single coil Jazz style e sono controllabili con due volumi indipendenti ed un tono.



Specifiche del JB-400 Vintage White di Eko Guitars

Colore: Vintage White

Forma del corpo: Eko VJB, stile Jazz Bass

Materiale del corpo: Pawlonia

Materiale del manico: Acero americano

Materiale tastiera: Laurel

Numero di tasti: 21

Tipo di tasti: Jumbo medio, 2,5 mm

Lunghezza della scala: 868 mm

Larghezza del capotasto: 42 mm

Finitura del corpo: Gloss

Finitura del manico: Satin

Forma del manico: profilo Low-C

Ponte: Eko Vintage bass, stile Jazz Bass a 4 corde

Battipenna: Aged White

Pickup: 2x JB single-coil

Controlli: 2x Volume + Tono

Meccaniche: Eko Bass

Numero di corde: 4

Corde consigliate: Eko 45-105 MEDIUM SET/4

Custodia: non inclusa

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-4 Left-Handed Electric Bass Honey Satin — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Schecter Stiletto Studio-4 Left-Handed Electric Bass Honey Satin

The Stiletto Studio-4 LH delivers a comfortable, responsive left-handed platform built around a thin 'C' neck profile and 34" scale that accommodates both precision fretting and fluid movement across the fretboard. Neck-through construction with Ultra Access design provides seamless upper-fret reach, while the mahogany body with bubinga top balances weight and resonance. This is a purpose-built instrument for left-handed players who demand professional-grade components and active electronics without compromise.

Playability & Neck Design

The thin 'C' neck profile measures .787" at the 1st fret and .866" at the 12th fret, offering a slender grip that reduces hand fatigue during extended sessions. 24 X-Jumbo frets on a rosewood fretboard with 16" radius provide both articulate note definition and forgiving playability, while abalone offset dot inlays deliver clear visual reference points. The Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut ensures stable tuning and clean string articulation across all four strings.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG 35HZ pickups paired with 3-band EMG active E/Q controls and master volume/blend deliver punchy lows, articulate mids, and extended highs with solid output authority. An 18-volt battery compartment supplies consistent headroom and dynamic response, while the Diamond Custom Bass bridge locks in solid sustain and precise intonation across the entire range.

Key Features
  • Left-Handed Configuration – Purpose-built for left-handed players
  • Neck-Through Construction with Ultra Access – Enhanced upper-fret accessibility and body resonance
  • Maple/Walnut Multi-ply Neck – Stable, reinforced neck with thin 'C' profile
  • 24 X-Jumbo Frets on Rosewood Fretboard – Precise articulation with forgiving playability
  • Mahogany Body with Bubinga Top – Balanced tone and visual appeal
  • Dual EMG 35HZ Pickups – Active electronics with punchy, articulate response
  • 3-Band EMG Active E/Q with Master Volume/Blend – Comprehensive tone shaping
  • 18-Volt Battery System – Consistent headroom and dynamic output
  • Diamond Custom Bass Bridge – Solid sustain and precise intonation
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq Nut – Stable tuning and clean articulation
  • Satin Gold Hardware – Durable, corrosion-resistant finish
  • 34" Scale (863mm) – Standard 4-string bass scale for balanced string tension

The Stiletto Studio-4 LH combines active electronics, professional-grade construction, and left-handed accessibility into a single cohesive instrument ready for studio and stage work.

item.title: Ibanez Gsr200b 2024 - Weathered black — $165
item.description:
$165 · Good · Garrin's Gear Bazaar

great beginner bass i got a new one so I don’t have use for my old Ones the only issue is slight fret buzz which can be fixed very easily with a simple Allen wrench or your local music store for free bass is basically brand new I have barely played this one

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H Ghost Pepper Red — $1,950
item.description:
$1,950 · Excellent · Carry On My Wayward Shop

Great looking and sounding bass!! Plays amazing!! Very light scratching on the pickguard. I don't get to play it that often because I'm primarily a guitar player. Weighs 8lbs 14oz. U. S. shipping only. Case included.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX174 4-String Electric Bass - Violin Burst — $259.99
item.description:
$259.99 · Brand New · Music Emporium, Inc. (Y2PLAY Stores)

Description

The TRBX174 represents a price breakthrough for the TRBX range, yet the quality is everything you'd expect from a Yamaha bass.

With Yamaha's unique combination of advanced design, precision engineering and time-honored craftsmanship, the Yamaha Guitar Development team have created the perfect instrument for bass players who aren't ready to compromise. An instrument that seamlessly blends the powerful sound you need to underpin your performance with immense flexibility so you can create and define your own tone. An instrument that offers unparalleled comfort and playability combined with construction you can depend on—show after show, session after session. An instrument designed and built to be the core of your music.

Product Features

  • Incredible Quality and Value
  • Mahogany Body
  • Vintage Style Bridge

Attributes

  • Color: Black

Technical Specifications

  • Type: Electric
  • # of Strings: 4
  • Orientation: Right
  • Body Material: Mahogany
  • Body Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-On
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Scale Length: 34"
  • # of Frets: 24
  • Nut Width: 1.57"
  • Pickup Configuration: SS
  • Features: Fingerboard Inlay
  • Nut Material: Urea
  • Tuning Machines: Covered
  • Electronics: Neck P.U. Volume, Bridge P.U. Volume, Master Tone
  • Controls: Passive
  • Pickup - Neck: Split Single Coil / Ceramic
  • Pickup - Bridge: Single Coil / Ceramic
  • Fingerboard Material: Rosewood

item.title: Fernandes MB-90 Mockingbird Bass Neck thru 90's White — $962.84
item.description:
$962.84 · Good · NCYO Guitars

Cleaned, polished.

Truss rod, electrics checked.

Plays and works fine.

Vintage Fernandes MB-90.

Made in Japan

Neck thru

White

I ship international.

item.title: Bassmods Cali Jazz 5 Bass Guitar — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

Bassmods Cali 5, flamed maple top, ash body, maple neck with maple fretboard , Aguilar pickups and preamp. Sound clip in video attached

item.title: Fernandes MB-65 Mockingbird Bass 90's Black — $673.99
item.description:
$673.99 · Good · NCYO Guitars

Cleaned, polished.

Truss rod, electrics checked.

Plays and works fine.

Fernandes Mockingbird Bass MB-65

Black

I ship international.

item.title: Yamaha Trbx174 2021 - Old violin sunburst — $175
item.description:
$175 · Very Good · Garrin's Gear Bazaar

Works great awesome beginner bass only imperfection is at the headstock with a Slight white smudge I got a new bass and am selling my old ones

item.title: Dillion Thunderbird bass - rare — $750
item.description:
$750 · Excellent · MJD Lefty's Used Gear

Bought this from a guy recently who never played it. It still had the wax paper over the neck and plastic wrap on the pickguard. Still has the original strings on. Basically new condition.


It’s a very rare bass. Dillion Guitars made this around 2010 and it was only on the market for a little while before Gibson demanded they stop making them due to lawsuits.


It’s about as close as you will get to the American version of the Gibson Thunderbird.


It’s a pretty light bass, haven’t weighed it but I’d guess around 8 pounds.


It will also come with a coffin styled hard case.

item.title: Vintage Fender Precision Bass Guitar - 1976 - Black / Maple — $2,550
item.description:
$2,550 · Very Good · Jeff's Gear Locker

This is the real deal! Great bass. I'm not in a band anymore and it's not getting the playing time it deserves. All original. Frets are in excellent shape. Great action and neck (has a tiny bit of flame to it). About 9.8-lbs on my bathroom scale and snarl for days. Has new D'Addario 45-105 strings and is everything you'd want from a 70's precision bass. Has the original thumb rest and bridge/pickup covers in the case. Free USA shipping and case as pictured. One latch on the case is a bit stubborn, but it works. Bass is gigged w/ some finish wear, but it's honestly in pretty good shape for being 50-years old. Thanks for looking!

item.title: Fender Precision 1973 - Sunburst — $4,300
item.description:
$4,300 · Very Good · Eric's Gear Depot

1973 Fender Precision Bass with rosewood fingerboard, weighs 8 lbs on my scale. Frets are fine and truss rod works fine. All original, I believe the only possibility of not being all original is the control knobs but I do think the are original. Comes with a newer Fender AVRI case. Original hardshell case was "toast" when I got it.

Contact me with any questions at 615-594-1595

item.title: ESP LTD MLB-4 Black Blast w/Case — $2,099
item.description:
$2,099 · Brand New · XYZ GUITARS

SPECIFICATIONS

CONSTRUCTION Bolt-On

SCALE 35"

BODY Swamp Ash

NECK 5Pc Wenge / Purpleheart (Black Satin / Open Pore)

FINGERBOARD Macassar Ebony

FINGERBOARD RADIUS 400mm

FINISH Black Blast

NUT WIDTH 42mm

NUT TYPE Molded

NECK CONTOUR Extra Thin U

FRETS/TYPE 24 XJ Stainless

HARDWARE COLOR Black

STRAP BUTTON Standard

TUNERS Gotoh

BRIDGE Gotoh 404BO-4

NECK PU Nordstrand Big Splits

BRIDGE PU Nordstrand Big Splits

ELECTRONICS LAYOUT Volume/Volume/ABQ-3MS 3 Band EQ

STRINGS D'Addario XL165 (.045/.065/.085/.105)

CASE B BASS FORM FIT CASE

CASE INCLUDED Y

item.title: Fodera Imperial 5 MG Electric Bass 2015 - Koa / BRW — $13,000
item.description:
$13,000 · Excellent · TC Outlet

For sale is my 2015 Fodera Imperial MG 5 Elite - Koa / BRW in excellent condition

Specs:
- Imperial MG Body Shape
- Walnut body / Alder tone block / solid Koa top
- 3pc Maple neck
- 34" Scale length / 26frets
- Brazilian Rosewood fingerboard
- mother of pearl dot inlays
- Duncan dual coil pickups
- Fodera/Pope 3 band preamp in MG layout
- 19-17.5mm sting spacing
- 10.5lbs
- Comes with Fodera Deluxe hard case

Born in E-C tunning and currently strung in B-G, has 1 small ding on the back of the body, and there's a small fill on the 25th fret, it was patched in the factory and went to the dealer here in Canada, it does not affect the playbility and the sound of the instrument. has really light play wear as the bass is near 11years old and still in execellent condition.

item.title: Fender Precision 1973 - Sunburst — $3,300
item.description:
$3,300 · Very Good · Eric's Gear Depot

1973 Fender Precision Bass all original except the Pickup, its a Lolar, frets are fine, truss rod works fine. Great playing bass. I believe the original pots are in a plastic zip lock back and will be sent to buyer. Light bass around 8.25 lbs. Comes with non-original Fender American Vintage Reissue case.

Contact me with any questions at 615-594-1595.

item.title: Rickenbacker 2025 4003 Electric Bass Guitar - Mapleglo, Rosewood Fingerboard, with Hard Case — $2,199.99
item.description:
$2,199.99 · Mint · Strait Music

The Classic Rickenbacker 4003 bass – famous for its ringing sustain, treble punch and solid underlying bass. A subtle strip of binding graces the elegantly curved body and the Rosewood fingerboard. Deluxe triangular inlays and stereo capability are standard features.

The modern incarnation of the 4003 features many improvements players have been asking for: a thinner, early 70’s style neck profile with an improved bi-flex truss rod system, a new fully adjustable tailpiece, and a redesigned bridge pickup surround for effortless access to the strings from any position on the body.

This example is in as-new condition with a vintage-style gold pickguard and truss rod cover (the original white pieces are included). A factory hardshell case is included.

Specifications:

  • Body Type: Solid
  • No. Frets: 20
  • Scale Length: 84.5cm (33 1/4″)
  • Neck Width at Nut: 42.9 mm (1 11/16”)
  • Neck Width at 12th Fret: 54.0 mm (2 1/8”)
  • Crown Radius: 25.4 cm (10”)
  • Body Wood: Maple
  • Neck Wood: Maple & Walnut
  • Fingerboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Weight: 4.1 kg (9.0 lbs.)
  • Overall Length: 113.8 cm (44 13/16”)
  • Overall Width: 34.3 cm (13 1/2”)
  • Overall Depth: 31.8 mm (1 1/4”)
  • Neck Binding: Yes
  • Fret Marker Style: Triangle
  • Tailpiece: RIC
  • Bridge: V2
  • Neck Type: Thru body
  • No. of Pickups: 2
  • Type of Pickups: Hi-gain
  • Output Type: Mono and Stereo
  • Machine Heads: Schaller

item.title: Cort Artisan Space 4 - Star Dust Green — $714.24
item.description:
$714.24 · Good · Riku Levasmaa

Cort Headless In beautiful Star Dust Green finish.

Some specs:

-Maple body with a poplar burl top.

-7-piece neck made of roasted maple, maple, walnut, and purpleheart. C-shaped profile.

-Roasted maple fingerboard with a 15.75" radius.

-24 medium-jumbo frets plus a zero fret.

-34" scale length.

-Bartolini MK-1 pickups and preamp with bass, mid, and treble controls.


The bass is pleasantly lightweight, making it comfortable even for someone with back problems. Thanks to its headless design, it's perfectly balanced with no neck dive whatsoever. Overall, it's an exceptionally nice instrument to play. The only reason I'm selling it is that the neck is just a little too thick for my hands, no matter how much I try to move away from Ibanez's "toothpick" necks.

The bass has mainly been used for rehearsals and a couple of gigs as a backup instrument. It has no dings, dents, or noticeable wear.

It is currently set up In C standard tuning with a relatively fresh 55-130 string set. To fit these heavy-gauge strings, I had to remove the headpiece string lock once and slightly file the slot for the lowest string so it would fit properly. While reinstalling the string lock, one of the screws snapped and was replaced with a standard screw. This is visible in the photos, but it has no practical effect on the instrument's functionality.

Because of the string gauge, the saddle for the second-thickest string has been rotated 180 degrees to allow proper intonation adjustment. It can easily be returned to its original orientation simply by rotating it back.

Included with the bass are the original Cort gig bag made specifically for this model, as well as Schaller strap locks.

item.title: Fender Player Mustang Bass PJ-fretless 2020’s - Firemist Gold — $775
item.description:
$775 · Excellent · jovan's Boutique

Short string Fender bass, modified by professional luthier, now fretless with ebony fretboard. Excellent condition, no dings, scratches etc

item.title: ~2000 Fender CIJ-MIJ '62 Reissue Jazz Bass JB62 Vintage White — $1,350
item.description:
$1,350 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender '62 Reissue Jazz Bass (JB62) was Crafted in Japan between 1997 and 2000. The bass is in very good overall condition and has been professionally set up and is playing great with low and comfortable action. The bass shows some typical cosmetic wear such as nicks, dings and scratches. The bass looks great and the Vintage white finish has faded to a very cool cream color. The bass weighs 9 LBS & 3 ounces and comes with a gig bag.

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1965 - 3 Tone Sunburst — $13,000
item.description:
$13,000 · Very Good · TC Outlet

1965 Fender Precision ,
Transition period instrument, Neck stamp - Aug 1965, L serial

Volume pot was replaced long ago, currently has hipshop tuners (I do have the original tuners), otherwise this bass is all original. This bass was well played, and has aged beautifully, the neck feels amazing. The original 3TS finish is unreal and lots mojo ...

Specs:
- Alder body, original 3 Tone Sunburst finish
- Maple neck, rosewood fingerboard, clay dots, 20frets
- original pickups
- 8.7lbs
- ships with generic hardshell case

item.title: Handmade JB 2023 - Mahogany — $385
item.description:
$385 · Excellent · The College Fund

* * * US SHIPPING ONLY. NO RETURNS * * * 


* * * US SHIPPING ONLY. NO RETURNS * * * 


Selling this custom made modern Jazz type bass I got at a sale last year. Its mahogany according to the guy who had it, is just like the other one I have up, this one needs all the parts, and a neck, which I measured a standard 2.5 wide. I just don't have the time to finish and build this and the other one. So your gain. It's a very nice looking body tho.


* * * US SHIPPING ONLY. NO RETURNS * * * 


* * * US SHIPPING ONLY. NO RETURNS * * *

item.title: 2026 Rickenbacker 3030 - Walnut — $3,150
item.description:
$3,150 · Excellent · CJ's Gear Locker

Up for grabs is a 1 of 5 made Rickenbacker 3030 Bass in Walnut! This 3030 is actually a pocket full of fun, in more ways than one! It’s got super short scale flats on them that actually have decent tension, not too wobbly at all!

This is a fun curiosity but not a unicorn! I’m reminded of the Supro(?) Pocket Basses of the 60s, and while this isn’t exactly an entry level instrument, it does have the 60s charm! If you’re looking for Geddy Lee or Chris Squire tones, THIS AINT FOR YOU!!! But if you love that Tic Tac sound or the woofy low end or plucky top end of 60s Semi-Hollow Basses, think those Vox Teardrops and similar, this is the bass for you! It does come shipped in a hardshell case as well.


Specs:

Construction: Set Neck

Scale: 24.75″

Body: Walnut

Neck: Maple & Walnut

Fingerboard: Maple

Fingerboard Radius: 10″

Frets: 21

Inlays:Dot

Pickups: Hot Toaster

Bridge: 4-Saddle

Tailpiece: R

Tuners: Schaller M4

Weight: 8 lbs

Other: Ships with Flatwound Strings

item.title: Sterling by Music Man StingRay 5 – 5 String Bass Black Maple Neck — $540
item.description:
$540 · Good · A-1 Hawk

Sterling By Music Man StingRay RAY5 5-String Bass Guitar w/ Soft Case

This Sterling RAY5 delivers the classic StingRay look and punch with a modern, affordable build. It features a solid basswood body finished in glossy black, a comfortable maple neck, a 34" scale length, and a 5-string design for extended low-end range. The onboard active electronics use the recognizable Music Man-style humbucker paired with an active preamp for strong, clear output suitable for rock, funk, worship, and studio work. Hardware operates quietly and smoothly, and the tuning machines hold tuning well.


This bass shows normal cosmetic wear from use. The front and sides have light scuffs, while the back has more notable scratches. None of the wear affects playability or structural integrity. The neck is straight, frets feel good, and the pickup/preamp tests clean with no unwanted noise. Includes a soft case for protection and transport. A solid, reliable 5-string option for players wanting the StingRay tone without the high price tag.

item.title: Fender Telecaster Bass with Maple Fretboard-1978-Sunburst — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Very Good · Drew's Gear Bazaar

Completely original 1978 fender telecaster bass. Has some wear and tear over the years but considering its age it’s in phenomenal condition and sounds amazing. Weighs 9.5 lbs Comes with Gator Hard Shell Case. reasonable offers will be considere.

item.title: 2025 Spector USA Custom Shop NS-2 - Buckeye Natural Matte — $8,052.91
item.description:
$8,052.91 · Brand New · 12th Fret Music

Spector USA Custom Shop NS-2 4-String Bass - Buckeye Natural Matte

Solid Body 4-String Active Electric Bass, Double-Cut Style Black Walnut Body with Buckeye Burl Top, EMG Active Pickups

General

Model: NS-2 4-String Neck-Thru

Scale Length: 34"

Side Dots: Blue Luminlay

Preamp: Spector HAZ 9V

Other

Case: Hardshell Case

Accessories: Included

item.title: Alembic Custom 4 String JPJ 2016 - Zebrawood — $19,995
item.description:
$19,995 · Excellent · Johnny 's Alembics

Johnny Rock's Custom Alembic John Paul Jones Signature 4-String Bass

A One-of-a-Kind Collector's Instrument

Offered from my personal collection is an exceptionally rare, custom-built Alembic bass inspired by one of the most iconic bassists in rock history—John Paul Jones of Led Zeppelin.

This instrument was custom commissioned using the same Triple Omega body design, knobby headstock, and Zebrawood/Mahogany wood combination made famous by John Paul Jones' legendary Alembic 8-string bass. While inspired by that historic instrument, this bass was purpose-built as a highly versatile 4-string, medium-scale instrument that combines collector appeal with exceptional playability.

Premium Specifications

  • Custom Alembic Triple Omega Body
  • Medium Scale
  • Mahogany Body with stunning Zebrawood Top
  • Ebony Fingerboard
  • Satin-finished tapered Jazz neck for exceptional comfort and speed
  • Five-piece Maple and Walnut set neck
  • Knobby Alembic Headstock
  • Abalone Position Inlays
  • Custom Dove Inlay at the First Fret
  • Violet LED Side Markers
  • Amber illuminated 12th and 24th fret position markers
  • Alembic AXY Neck Pickup
  • Alembic FatBoy Bridge Pickup

Built for Performance

The medium-scale neck provides an incredibly comfortable playing experience while retaining the unmistakable piano-like clarity that Alembic instruments are known for. The satin neck finish allows for effortless movement across the fingerboard, making this instrument equally at home in the studio or on stage.

The electronics pairing of the AXY neck pickup and FatBoy bridge pickup delivers an enormous tonal range—from warm, articulate fingerstyle tones to aggressive modern rock sounds with exceptional definition.

Visually Stunning

The rich Zebrawood top over the Mahogany body creates one of Alembic's most beautiful wood combinations. Combined with the iconic Triple Omega body and the signature knobby headstock, this bass commands attention before a single note is played.

The custom Dove inlay at the first fret adds a unique personal touch, while the violet LED fret markers, accented by amber illumination at the 12th and 24th frets, create a spectacular visual presentation for live performance.

Collector Quality

This is not simply another custom bass—it is a tribute to one of rock's greatest bass players, built using the same signature body shape, headstock design, and premium tonewood combination associated with John Paul Jones' famous Alembic 8-string.

Whether displayed in a world-class collection or played on stage, this instrument represents the craftsmanship, innovation, and artistry that have made Alembic one of the most respected names in boutique bass building.

This is a truly one-of-a-kind opportunity to own an extraordinary custom Alembic that blends historical inspiration with modern performance.


Private White-Glove Delivery Included
For qualified buyers, I will personally travel to deliver the instrument, complete the transaction in person, and provide a private demonstration. This ensures safe transport, authenticity, and a truly collector-level acquisition experience (offer available worldwide)

item.title: Ibanez Tmb100m — $200
item.description:
$200 · Very Good · Alabaster Music Company

This Ibanez tmb100m is in very good condition (has some dings and scratches but other than that it plays and sounds good! (No case)

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Solid Body Electric Bass Guitar (1980), ser. #S901348, black gig bag case. — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Excellent · Retrofret Vintage Guitars

Fender Precision Bass Model Solid Body Electric Bass Guitar (1980), made in Fullerton, California, serial # S901348, natural polyester finish, ash body, maple neck, black gig bag case.

This is a nice playing example of a "late CBS" 1980 Fender Precision, with an ash body in the then-common natural finish with the black pickguard introduced in 1976. The features are typical for the end-of-the-70s period, with the finger rest now above the strings and a slimmer nut width. At a hair under 9 pounds, this is a pretty typical weight for a the period; the bass handles well and has a even, growly tone.

This bass has a the theoretically date-encoded serial number on the headstock decal, something CBS/Fender tried for a few years then abandoned as too much trouble. The number suggests 1979 but the pots are dated to the 29th week of 1980. The poly-finished maple neck has a slim 1 5/8" nut, topped off with the large black Fender logo decal on the headstock and chrome-plated Fender-branded tuning keys.

This now 45+ year old bass still plays and sounds great, an excellent gigging and recording instrument and more proof that, even in the deepest depths of the CBS-Fender era, the Precision Bass was a design that was almost foolproof!

Overall length is 46 in. (116.8 cm.), 13 in. (33 cm.) wide at lower bout, and 1 5/8 in. (4.1 cm.) in depth, measured at side of rim. Scale length is 34 in. (864 mm.). Width of nut is 1 5/8 in. (41 mm.)., 8.98 lbs.

This is a nicely original bass showing just some wear overall but nothing too serious. There is checking and some scuffs, dings and dents to the finish, but no wear spots through the (very thick) Poly except a few small chips to the body edges. The neck has some wear on the wood on the edges of the fingerboard but only a couple of shallow dinks to the back.

The pickups and wiring are original as is all hardware; both chrome covers and the thumbrest are long gone. The original pickguard has a lot of scuffing and there is a typical small repair at the screw near the jack. New foam has been added under the pickups to preserve adjustability. This is a very good player with a solid growly sound, still the world standard in low-end muscle. Excellent - Condition.

item.title: Fernandes Teb-1 Tele Bass 1990s - Vintage white — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Alabaster Music Company

This TEB-1 is in very good condition (has some chips and marks but other than that it plays great and sounds really good! (no case)

item.title: Alembic Essence 4 1995 The Mummy’s Curse — $4,250
item.description:
$4,250 · Excellent · Big Juan’s Bass Works

This bass has a name - THE MUMMY‘S CURSE. As you can see, it has intricate Egyptian inlays in the fingerboard. The Essence model is perhaps Alembic’s most streamlined with all the electronics concealed in a small lightweight body. It has 3 knobs - volume, pickup pan, and proprietary low-pass filter. The craftsmanship is exceptional - with a one piece body with through neck and all the beautiful binding - gold machine heads and brass bridge. It’s truly a work of art and plays amazing. Only major work we’ve done with it is a basic fret level, dress and polish, and cut the sprouting edges. I’ve tried to represent all cosmetic defects and I’m happy to address any others you may see with the lighting reflections. There‘s even a new set of La Bellas like Stanley Clarke uses. I’m very hesitant to let this go, but I’m only allowed to have 7 basses and just bought another so it’s time for this masterpiece to find a new owner.

item.title: Music Man Translucent 5HH 2006 — $2,077.47
item.description:
$2,077.47 · Very Good · Jonathan's gear outlet

Good condition Musicman with original Hardcase.

Neck replaced before i get this but i have confirmation the neck is legit via sending email to musicman.

Low action and new Daddrio strings.

item.title: Ibanez GSR205B-WK Weathered Black 5-String #534 — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Brand New · Bay Tunes Guitars

For decades, the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.

A guitar doesn't have to cost a lot to sound great. The GIO series was developed for players who want Ibanez quality and performance in a more affordable package. Not only do they look and play better than many other offerings in their price range, but they are held to the same standards and come with warranty is the same as Ibanez's more expensive models.

  • Stock #534
  • 7 lbs 4 oz
  • SPECS
  • neck type GSR5 Maple neck
  • top/back/body Okoume body
  • fretboard Jatoba fretboardWhite dot inlay
  • fret Medium frets
  • bridge B15 bridge
  • string space 16.5mm
  • neck pickup Dynamix H neck pickupPassive
  • bridge pickup Dynamix H bridge pickupPassive
  • equalizer Phat II EQ
  • factory tuning 1G,2D,3A,4E,5B
  • string gauge .045/.065/.080/.100/.125
  • hardware color Black
  • NECK DIMENSIONS
  • Scale : 864mm/34"
  • a : Width 45mm at NUT
  • b : Width 67mm at 22F
  • c : Thickness 21mm at 1F
  • d : Thickness 22mm at 12F
  • Radius : 305mmR
  • Maple neck
  • The Maple neck provides stability and bright tonal character.
  • Phat II EQ
  • Phat II active bass boost adds additional low-end power.
  • Jatoba Fretboard
  • Jatoba has a reddish brown color which produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end.
  • B10 series bridge
  • The B10 bridge allows fully adjustable intonation and solid tuning stability.
  • Dynamix H pickups
  • Dynamix H pickups deliver rich and powerful sound.

item.title: 2025 Rickenbacker 4003 SJPS Electric Bass Guitar in Jetglo Pearlstars 4003SJPS — $2,699.99
item.description:
$2,699.99 · Excellent · CAPITOL GUITARS

For your consideration is a gently used Rickenbacker 4003 SJPS Electric Bass Guitar in Jetglo Pearlstars 4003SJPS. Simply a tremendous axe that RIPS. Low action...almost plays itself.

Headstock looks rather clean with minimal signs of use. Frets and fretboard look tremendous!

Body is looking very clean with hardly any signs of use...some light strum markings, but nothing unsightly. This bass was loved...used carefully!

Comes with hardshell case.
